query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS solbones_frequency_rolls (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT,
  dice_1 INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  dice_2 INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  dice_3 INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  frequency INT,
  score INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  notes TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS solbones_leaderboard (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT,
  username VARCHAR(255),
  score INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  games_played INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  highest_score INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  total_tallies INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
